event: Parisian street scene at Place de la Republique
description: A rainy Parisian boulevard at dusk with glistening wet pavement reflecting golden shop lights and streetlamps. Pedestrians in dark coats walk along the sidewalk. A horse-drawn carriage moves through the street. Bare autumn trees line the avenue. A large monument with a standing figure rises in the background against gray-blue buildings. The warm light from storefronts contrasts with the cool, overcast sky.
